notes: All 30 entries are features_page.rs fn search_terms() strings; each target preserves the original English token sequence verbatim, then appends a single space and Chinese keywords (lowercase Latin tokens like vim/mac/windows/ssh/ai/pwd kept lowercase to match the matcher's to_lowercase() step; no punctuation; no duplicates with original English words). Widget contexts verified by grepping the surrounding struct name (e.g. NativeRedirectWidget L4174 -> 'Open links in desktop app' deep-link setting; SnackbarHeaderWidget L4338 -> sticky command-block header snackbar; QuitWarningModalWidget L4459 -> confirm-on-quit modal; LoginItemWidget L4506 -> launch-on-login; MouseScrollMultiplierWidget L4651; DefaultTerminalWidget L4784; BlockLimitWidget L4829; SSHWrapperWidget L4890; ConfirmCloseSharedSessionWidget L5232; ExtraMetaKeysWidget L5280; GlobalHotkeyWidget L5349; AtContextMenuInTerminalModeWidget L5933; SlashCommandsInTerminalModeWidget L5985). No ambiguous entries; no entries were untranslatable. do_not_translate_subflags is empty per §12 (bilingual-append is additive translation, NOT do_not_translate).
